Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to exempting disabled veterans from certain fees relating to physical modification of a residence to accommodate a disability
Summary: Relates to exempting disabled veterans from application fees relating to physical modification of a residence to accommodate a disability, including permit fees, plan review fees, inspection fees and reinspection fees.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to exempting disabled veterans from certain fees relating to physical modification of a residence to accommodate a disability
